## Validation

- [ ] Documentation is written or updated in English
- [ ] Markdown link validation remains green
- [ ] Current-state accuracy was checked against the repositories or workflows described
- [ ] Cross-links were added or updated where the change affects related docs
- [ ] Roadmap, backlog, audit-history, and retrospective-only content were not introduced into the central docs repo
